positive: A stylized, high-contrast illustration featuring a majestic mountain peak with a soaring, mythical griffin at its summit. The style is neo-traditional tattoo art meets abstract geometric linework. Use a limited, striking color palette of deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and gold leaf accents on a stark white background. The composition must be centrally framed, emphasizing the dynamic silhouette of the griffin in flight and the angular majesty of the mountain. Strong backlighting creates dramatic contrast and clean edges, making it perfect for screen printing on dark apparel. The overall mood is epic, powerful, and adventurous.
